testcase.name: tests.test_parser
testcase.error: ../../.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:507: in importtestmodule mod = import_path( ../../.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/pathlib.py:587: in import_path importlib.import_module(module_name) /opt/homebrew/Cellar/python@3.14/3.14.3_1/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1398: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1371: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1342: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:938: in _load_unlocked ??? ../../.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) ../phase_04/tests/test_parser.py:1: in <module> from tinylang.parser import parse E File "/Users/llmadmin/src/LLMGateway/benchmark/ModelB_32bcoder/phase_05/tinylang/parser.py", line 129 E return IfStmt(cond, then_block, else_block) while not self.check('}') and not self.is_at_end(): E ^^^^^ E SyntaxError: invalid syntax
